comments.LineComment: | Sortable list components with drag-and-drop reordering, keyboard
| accessibility, and smooth animations. Supports both vertical and
| horizontal layouts, and dragging between multiple lists.
| -- Press Space/Enter to grab, arrow keys to move, Space/Enter to drop

value.value: Sortable list. Use arrow keys to reorder items.
Sortable item. Press Space or Enter to grab, arrow keys to reorder, Space or Enter to drop, Escape to cancel.
